summary: Added one sentence to end of WIN-053 detail_evidence sub-argument (ii) foreclosing the magnitude-only re-interpretation escape hatch. New sentence: 'The dome fits positive coefficient values to observed pole magnitudes; but measured field inclination at the geographic poles points oppositely — inward at one pole, outward at the other — so a magnitude-only re-interpretation still requires designating one aperture as the flux sink, which B(r) does not do.' Patch applied to data/wins.json:WIN-053.detail_evidence. Build passed, 3616/3616 tests pass.
